title: Paleo Savory Potato Cakes
description: A paleo-friendly twist on traditional potato pancakes, made with crispy potato and savory herbs.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and onion in a food processor.
Heat a non-stick pan with 1 tsp coconut oil over medium heat.
Add the grated potatoes and onion to the pan and stir fry for 5 minutes.
Mash the garlic and add it to the pan with the potatoes and onion.
Add the savory herbs and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg and coconut flour together.
Add the egg mixture to the pan and stir to combine.
Using a spatula, shape the mixture into patties.
Cook the patties for 4-5 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
